for example if the user ask to have um

about database

semantic.

uh sonar code context can help to uh to

we um in this um in this execution of
cursor we enrich the list of tools with

get intended architecture
um that gives the uh references and the

it's about to make uh it doesn't comply

the uh upstream call flow to get the

be modified, it will produce a report
plan uh with a list of changes that need

keeps uh keep architectural compliancy.
And here we can see the steps uh to

the um the architectural compliance that
the LLM um that the LLM respect uh by

All right. So uh now some results

Thanks for watching.
